zh.Broadclyst, Devon, England: 英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特
zh.Broad Clyst, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文布洛阿可利斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Tracy於1148年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親William de Tracy15歲，母親Rohese de la Pomeraie11歲。她於大約1169年與Henry de Champernon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1237年之後在英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特。

zh-hans.Broadclyst, Devon, England: 英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特
zh-hans.Broad Clyst, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文布洛阿可利斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Tracy于1148年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲William de Tracy15岁，母亲Rohese de la Pomeraie11岁。她于大约1169年与Henry de Champernon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1237年之后在英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Tracy was born in 1148, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Tracy, was 15 and her mother, Rohese de la Pomeraie, was 11. She married Henry de Champernon about 1169. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1237, in Broadclyst, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Tracy est née en 1148, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tracy, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Rohese de la Pomeraie, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Champernon environ 1169. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1237, à Broadclyst, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Tracy 1148 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tracy 15 und ihre Mutter Rohese de la Pomeraie 11. Sie hat um 1169 Henry de Champernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1237 in Broadclyst, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Tracy è nata il nel 1148 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Tracy, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Rohese de la Pomeraie, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Champernon circa 1169. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1237, nel Broadclyst, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Tracyが1148年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William de Tracyは15歳，母Rohese de la Pomeraieは11歳であった。約1169年にHenry de Champernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1237年以後にイギリスデボンブロアドクリストで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Tracy(이)가 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tracy(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de la Pomeraie(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1169년 Henry de Champernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 이후 영국 데폰 브로드클리스트에서 사망했다.

mn.Broad Clyst, Devonshire, England: Broadclyst, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Tracy nasceu em 1148, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Tracy, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de la Pomeraie, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Champernon aproximadamente 1169. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1237, em Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Tracy родилась в 1148 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Tracy было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de la Pomeraie, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Champernon около 1169 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1237 г. в местности броадклист, девон, Англия.

sm.WFT Est. 1166-1255: mai le e tusa o le 1166 e o'o I le 1255

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese de Tracy nació en 1148, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Tracy, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Rohese de la Pomeraie, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Henry de Champernon aproximadamente 1169. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1237, en Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra.
